title: DEAMON´s necessary FABRIC Things
description: This Modpack gives a Huge Performance Boost and Many Visual and QoL Changes with Loads of Features, Structures,...
body:
This modpack revamps Minecraft 1.21.1 almost completely, giving the player much more control and a more immersive experience, making it feel and look like Minecraft came out just a few years ago!

The modpack contains tons of new structures, a few new biomes and updated vanilla biomes. There are also lots of vanilla mob variants and loads of furnishings.
Bosses and new mobs as well as dungeons make you want to explore a new world with lots of adventures!

Sorry for the key bindings, it's pure chaos because there are so many mods. But luckily you can leave most of them empty.

Check out my [Client-Side](https://modrinth.com/modpack/deamons-necessary-fabric-client-things) for the best experience with my Server Side Version!
You have a Server? Check out my [Server-Side Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/deamons-necessary-fabric-server-things)!

# Known Bugs

- This isnt a bug but, **DONT UPDATE ANYTHING** _unless it says so_

If you found a Bug, need help or just want to chat you can join my Server on Discord! (The server is not completed)
